hooks.command: jq -r --arg today "$(date +%Y-%m-%d)" --arg cutoff "$(date -d '+14 days' +%Y-%m-%d 2>/dev/null || date -v+14d +%Y-%m-%d)" '[.[] | select(.next_earnings != null and .next_earnings >= $today and .next_earnings <= $cutoff)] | if length == 0 then "No earnings in the next 14 days." else "Upcoming earnings (next 14 days):\n" + (map("  " + .ticker + " — " + .next_earnings + " (" + .sector + ")") | join("\n")) end' "Investing/Wiki/Reference/Earnings Calendar.json" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Earnings Calendar not yet populated — run /ticker-monitor to build it.'
